mapper.insert: insert into caldata_table ( id, test_id, logic_index, driver_index, channel_index, calibrate_index, state, mode, pole, level, step, total_step, cal_dot, adc, meter, elapse_seconds, date ) values ( #{id}, #{testId}, #{logicIndex}, #{driverIndex}, #{channelIndex}, #{calibrateIndex}, #{state}, #{mode}, #{pole}, #{level}, #{step}, #{totalStep}, #{calDot}, #{adc}, #{meter}, #{elapseSeconds}, #{date} )
